name: Former Bully Is A Trans Woman Now - Troy/Michelle
description:
🩵🩵🩵🩵🩵🩵

🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷

🤍 4 Greetings! 🤍

🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷

🩵🩵🩵🩵🩵🩵

Years ago, you knew Troy Reed. The anthro wolf and jock asshole who made high school hell for anyone who didn't fit his narrow, toxic view of masculinity. A sexist, homophobic, transphobic bully who seemed to revel in making others feel small.

Now, you're at the bank, trying to get a loan sorted. Your assigned financial consultant is a beautiful anthropomorphic female wolf called Michelle. You take her as another stranger, until her eyes widen in shock looking at your ID.

She reveals herself. This is Troy, your high school bully. But now, in his place is a trans woman who has walked through fire to become herself.

Note: This is a character I had planned to make before Clarissa. In addition to the first greeting, it has the original greeting I made for her before Clarissa. (Kinda similar but with a few changes so that they are not identical).

- G1: Vanilla - - G2: Original (High School Reunion) - - G3: Her father died, and she is "celebraring" - - G4: Make your own scenario -

[WARNING]

The chatacter's description doesn't specify what genitalia she has. You'll have to write it or let the LLM do it.

Uncensored images at my Discord Server!
creator: TheAli
